nasb.text: Because he did not kill me before birth, So that my mother would have been my grave, And her womb ever pregnant.

esv.text: because he did not kill me in the womb; so my mother would have been my grave, and her womb forever great.

cnv.text: 因為他沒有使我死於母腹， 好使我的母親成了我的墳墓， 我永遠留在母腹中。

ccb.text: 因为他没有把我杀死在母腹中， 没有使母腹成为我的坟墓， 让我永远留在里面。
